context: Evaluates the agent's ability to separate objective from subjective standards and handle each correctly.

checklist.name: Objective standard checked
checklist.description: The /v1/ prefix standard is checked against the codebase

checklist.name: Subjective standards reported as manual review
checklist.description: Variable names, single responsibility, readability are marked for manual review

checklist.name: No fabricated checks
checklist.description: The agent does not attempt or fabricate automated checks for subjective standards
